text: AI is changing how we think about creativity. Today, machines can paint pictures, compose music, and even write stories. Some people worry that AI will replace human artists, but the truth is more complex. AI-generated art often comes from patterns it learns from existing works, while human creativity is based on personal experiences, emotions, and imagination. For example, an AI can create a poem about love, but it doesn't truly understand love. Instead, AI is best used as a tool to help humans explore new ideas. So, rather than replacing us, it can inspire us to be more creative.
